jokes.text: Can you believe no one between my apartment and here offered to do that for me? People.
jokes.setup: Phoebe needs help zipping up her dress
jokes.punchline: Her incredulous tone about strangers not offering to zip up random women on the street
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Phoebe's naive worldview, delivered with perfect matter-of-fact tone

jokes.text: But am I ready to take my Grade A loins off the meat market?
jokes.setup: Discussion about whether her relationship is getting serious
jokes.punchline: Phoebe's crude but creative metaphor comparing her body to meat products
jokes.explanation: Perfect Phoebe line - uniquely crude yet innocent phrasing that only she could deliver

jokes.text: I know. You are a bit of a drama queen.
jokes.setup: Ross admits he overthinks relationships
jokes.punchline: Phoebe's blunt, casual confirmation with no attempt at softening the blow
jokes.explanation: Good character beat - Phoebe's direct honesty cuts through social niceties

jokes.text: There isn't! That's what I'm saying. -Oh, my God, you're right!
jokes.setup: Ross trying to find examples of Phoebe's serious relationships
jokes.punchline: His shocked realization that she's actually right about never having one
jokes.explanation: Good escalation as Ross realizes the truth, sets up the episode's central premise

jokes.text: Oh, my God! I want to trade lives with Ross?!
jokes.setup: Ross mentions he's been married despite divorces
jokes.punchline: Phoebe's horror at wanting to trade lives with Ross of all people
jokes.explanation: Great escalation joke - the horror of wanting Ross's life is genuinely funny given his track record

jokes.text: Do you have a compact in your purse? -No. You look great.
jokes.setup: Mike asks if Phoebe has a compact to check how he looks
jokes.punchline: When she doesn't, he just tells her she looks great instead
jokes.explanation: Decent awkward moment showing Mike's nervousness, but fairly standard

jokes.text: Joey, I am not going to objectify women with you. But if her face is as nice as her ass... Mama!
jokes.setup: Monica refuses to objectify women with Joey
jokes.punchline: Immediately does exactly that and gets caught up in it
jokes.explanation: Good hypocrisy joke - Monica's moral stance immediately crumbles

jokes.text: Damn it. I'm gonna have to start listening when he talks about his job.
jokes.setup: Monica can't explain what Chandler does for work
jokes.punchline: Her admission that she doesn't listen to him talk about his job
jokes.explanation: Relatable relationship humor - plays on running gag about Chandler's mysterious job

jokes.text: You should bring your black see-through teddy with the attached garters. -How do you know I have one of those? -Didn't until just now.
jokes.setup: Joey suggests Monica bring specific lingerie
jokes.punchline: Reveals he was fishing for information and she fell for it
jokes.explanation: Clever misdirection - Joey's fishing expedition pays off perfectly

jokes.text: Hot. Not hot. Hot! Excuse me? I said that I think you're hot. And...now I'm embarrassed.
jokes.setup: Joey evaluating women as hot or not
jokes.punchline: Accidentally says it out loud to the woman he's checking out
jokes.explanation: Standard embarrassment humor - Joey's lack of filter creates awkward moment

jokes.text: Look, I don't normally ask out women that I meet in coffeehouses. Gesundheit.
jokes.setup: Joey trying to be smooth about asking her out
jokes.punchline: She thinks he sneezed when he said 'coffeehouses'
jokes.explanation: Good wordplay misdirection - 'coffeehouses' sounds like a sneeze

jokes.text: Did I--? Did I actually ask you? That's just where you were going. I figured I'd help you out.
jokes.setup: Hayley accepts a date Joey didn't finish asking for
jokes.punchline: She anticipated his question and saved him the trouble
jokes.explanation: Nice subversion - the woman takes charge of the dating ritual

jokes.text: You should see someone about that cold. If it gets much worse, you could die.
jokes.setup: Joey seems to have a cold from sneezing
jokes.punchline: Hayley's dramatic escalation from cold to death
jokes.explanation: Decent escalation humor but not particularly memorable

jokes.text: Would you call this girl: 'Thanks for...a lovely...evening'?
jokes.setup: Phoebe asks if Mike would call after their date
jokes.punchline: Her painful, halting delivery of how the call would go
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment - shows how the date went through painful phone call simulation

jokes.text: We are a rare breed.
jokes.setup: Ross describing good guys as hard to find
jokes.punchline: His complete lack of self-awareness about his own track record
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ross moment - his delusional self-regard is exactly on-character

jokes.text: Do you have any cake?
jokes.setup: Joey thanked his date for letting him have the last piece of cake at dinner
jokes.punchline: Immediately asks for more cake at her apartment
jokes.explanation: Great callback showing Joey's food obsession - perfect economy and character consistency

jokes.text: I think I've been scared by that painting before.
jokes.setup: Joey notices a scary painting
jokes.punchline: Realizes he's been in this apartment before
jokes.explanation: Good setup for the revelation that he's slept with her before

jokes.text: No, we didn't do it here...which is weird, because it seems like a perfectly good place. That's why.
jokes.setup: Joey remembering having sex in various places in the apartment
jokes.punchline: Visual reveal of why they didn't use one particular spot (presumably something inappropriate)
jokes.explanation: Good visual gag setup - audience sees something that explains Joey's logic

jokes.text: Unless... You're not gonna try and get me to join a cult, are you? No, it's just, you know, you have that look. Damn Supercuts!
jokes.setup: Mike asks if Ross is recruiting for a cult
jokes.punchline: Blames his cult-like appearance on his cheap haircut
jokes.explanation: Excellent unexpected punchline - Supercuts blame is both specific and relatable

jokes.text: You or the four other Mike Hanigans I bothered.
jokes.setup: Ross realizes he didn't need to bother Mike
jokes.punchline: Reveals he bothered multiple Mike Hanigans looking for the right one
jokes.explanation: Great escalation showing Ross's obsessive thoroughness in embarrassing himself

jokes.text: vis-a-vis...the following. Phoebe has never had a serious relationship...since...her super-serious relationship...with...Vikram.
jokes.setup: Ross tries to backtrack from his mistake
jokes.punchline: His painful, improvised lie with fake sophisticated language
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ross cringe moment - his pseudo-intellectual stalling while making up lies

jokes.text: Vikram? What? That's a real name.
jokes.setup: Mike questions the unusual name Vikram
jokes.punchline: Ross's defensive response as if that's the unbelievable part
jokes.explanation: Good defensive moment - Ross missing the point of Mike's skepticism

jokes.text: Why couldn't they have sent me to Texas? Seven o'clock. Maybe I'll hit the gym. Who am I kidding? Pay-per-view porn.
jokes.setup: Chandler considering his evening options in Tulsa
jokes.punchline: Immediately abandons the healthy choice for porn
jokes.explanation: Good escalation and self-awareness - Chandler's honest assessment of his plans

jokes.text: Yeah, everything's great. I was just...watching some regular television there. What a pleasant surprise.
jokes.setup: Monica catches Chandler in a compromising position
jokes.punchline: His awkward cover-up emphasizing 'regular' television
jokes.explanation: Standard embarrassment humor - the overselling makes it obvious he's lying

jokes.text: he was getting off...to a shark-attack show! -No! -Yes! Chandler watches shark porn!
jokes.setup: Monica explains what she walked in on
jokes.punchline: The absurd revelation that Chandler has a shark fetish
jokes.explanation: Highly original and absurd premise that becomes the episode's central running gag - very quotable

jokes.text: You promised to love him no matter what. 'What' means, like, if he gets a disease or kills someone. Not if he gets his jollies to Jaws.
jokes.setup: Rachel reminds Monica of her marriage vows
jokes.punchline: Her hierarchy of acceptable vs unacceptable marital issues
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation joke - the moral hierarchy is perfectly absurd yet logical

jokes.text: I once dated this guy who wanted to pretend...that he was an archaeologist, and I was this...naughty cavewoman who he unfroze from a block of ice. Are you talking about my brother?
jokes.setup: Rachel shares a story about a guy with weird fantasies
jokes.punchline: Monica realizes she's talking about Ross
jokes.explanation: Excellent reveal - the fantasy is weird enough, then the Ross connection makes it worse

jokes.text: But she should remember sleeping with me. I am very memorable! -How do we know? -We've never slept with you. -And whose fault is that?
jokes.setup: Joey insists he's memorable in bed
jokes.punchline: When they question this, he suggests they should have slept with him to know
jokes.explanation: Good Joey moment - his shameless proposition delivered with perfect confidence

jokes.text: I never have an off night. Okay? Although, sometimes if I'm a little bloated, I don't feel that sexy. But even then, I'm better than most!
jokes.setup: Joey defends his sexual prowess
jokes.punchline: Admits to having bloated nights but claims he's still better than most people
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Joey's ego even when making concessions

jokes.text: No salt! Bloaty!
jokes.setup: Callback to Joey's bloating comment
jokes.punchline: His immediate dietary adjustment to avoid bloating
jokes.explanation: Quick callback showing Joey's vanity affecting his eating habits

jokes.text: You don't think sharks are sexy, do you? No. Wait a minute. Wait, what was the Little Mermaid?
jokes.setup: Monica asks Joey about sharks being sexy
jokes.punchline: Joey's confusion about what species Ariel is
jokes.explanation: Decent callback to shark theme with Joey's typical confusion

jokes.text: If you hadn't just had a baby with my best friend...I swear to Lucifer...a rabid dog would be feasting on your danglers right now!
jokes.setup: Phoebe is furious with Ross for his meddling
jokes.punchline: Her creative and violent threat involving Lucifer and rabid dogs
jokes.explanation: Exceptional Phoebe threat - uniquely creative language and escalation that's perfectly in character

jokes.text: He's a kite designer. And he used to date Oprah.
jokes.setup: Ross continues building his fake Vikram story
jokes.punchline: Adds increasingly ridiculous details about kite design and dating Oprah
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of the lie with absurd but specific details

jokes.text: I'll go on walking tours with widows and lesbians.
jokes.setup: Phoebe imagining her future alone
jokes.punchline: Her specific vision of walking tours with a very particular demographic
jokes.explanation: Excellent specificity in Phoebe's catastrophizing - the demographic pairing is perfectly odd

jokes.text: I'm trying to remember the last time I opened a door and you weren't there.
jokes.setup: Mike opening the door to find Ross again
jokes.punchline: His observation about Ross's persistent appearances
jokes.explanation: Good callback to Ross's persistent appearances at Mike's door

jokes.text: Vikram just called.
jokes.setup: Phoebe decides to go along with Ross's lie
jokes.punchline: Claims the fictional Vikram actually called
jokes.explanation: Good escalation - Phoebe joining the lie by making it 'real'

jokes.text: Joey? I slept with you! And you obviously remember me! Hey, I still got it!
jokes.setup: Mystery woman reveals Joey's identity
jokes.punchline: Joey's relief at being memorable to someone, even if it's the wrong woman
jokes.explanation: Good payoff to Joey's ego crisis - his relief at being remembered by anyone

jokes.text: You gave up that right when you slept with Rachel. RacheI? I thought she just had a baby with Ross. Yeah, well...But Emma's birth certificate might say 'Geller'...but her eyes say 'Mukherjee.'
jokes.setup: Phoebe explains why she broke up with Vikram
jokes.punchline: Implies Vikram is Emma's real father based on her eyes
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation of the Vikram lie with soap opera-level drama

jokes.text: That is so wrong. And on top of that, he's a glue sniffer?
jokes.setup: Mike reacting to the revelation about Vikram and Rachel
jokes.punchline: Focuses on glue sniffing as an additional problem
jokes.explanation: Decent misdirection - focuses on the lesser issue amid the chaos

jokes.text: And you don't have to worry about glue-sniffing with me. Although, I do smell the occasional Magic Marker.
jokes.setup: Mike assuring Phoebe he doesn't have substance abuse issues
jokes.punchline: Admits to smelling Magic Markers occasionally
jokes.explanation: Good confession joke - the Magic Marker detail is specific and relatable

jokes.text: Can I think it's cool that you kissed me...and also want to kiss you again? And be a little concerned about the Magic Markers?
jokes.setup: Romantic moment between Phoebe and Mike
jokes.punchline: Phoebe's concern about his Magic Marker habit
jokes.explanation: Nice callback maintaining the running gag while advancing the romance

jokes.text: This is Vikram.
jokes.setup: Phoebe pointing at someone/something
jokes.punchline: Visual reveal of what she's calling Vikram (presumably something ridiculous)
jokes.explanation: Perfect economy visual gag - two words that presumably reveal something absurd

jokes.text: Well, well, well. It must be 5:00 in Tulsa...because it's 'sex o'clock' in N.Y.C.!
jokes.setup: Monica trying to seduce Chandler
jokes.punchline: Her attempted sexy wordplay with 'sex o'clock'
jokes.explanation: Decent pun attempt showing Monica's awkward attempts at being sexy

jokes.text: This is the only one they had at our video store. Though they did have something called Crocodile Killers. Or does it always have to be sharks?
jokes.setup: Monica trying to cater to Chandler's perceived shark fetish
jokes.punchline: Her willingness to accommodate with alternative predator content
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing Monica's commitment to supporting her husband's perceived kinks

jokes.text: Do you want me to get into the tub and...thrash?
jokes.setup: Monica offering alternatives to shark videos
jokes.punchline: Her offer to physically simulate shark behavior in the tub
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation - Monica's willingness to personally act out shark behavior is both touching and hilarious

jokes.text: I saw what you were doing in Tulsa. Angry sharks turn you on!
jokes.setup: Monica confronting Chandler about his fetish
jokes.punchline: Her specific diagnosis that it's angry sharks that excite him
jokes.explanation: Good specificity - angry sharks as opposed to just any sharks shows Monica's analytical mind

jokes.text: Yes. Just some good, old-fashioned, American, girl-on-girl action.
jokes.setup: Chandler explaining what he was actually watching
jokes.punchline: His patriotic description of lesbian pornography
jokes.explanation: Good escalation - Chandler's relief leads to overly patriotic description of porn

jokes.text: I'm very, very drunk right now.
jokes.setup: Chandler praising Monica's understanding and support
jokes.punchline: Monica's honest admission that alcohol enabled her supportive behavior
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan delivery explaining her willingness to accommodate shark fetishes

jokes.text: You're in your 30s and you have never been in a long-term relationship. Here you go from woman to woman...meaningless experience to meaningless experience. Never even worrying that it doesn't turn into something more serious. You're right. I love my life!
jokes.setup: Ross giving Joey the same lecture he gave Phoebe about meaningless relationships
jokes.punchline: Joey's complete opposite reaction - celebrating his lifestyle
jokes.explanation: Excellent callback and character contrast - same speech, completely different reaction based on personality
